trades.reasoning: Down -6.1% against a -7% stop-loss, RSI at 48 (neutral) and lowest score of our holdings at 75 — proactively exiting before auto-stop fires to redeploy into stronger momentum.
Highest momentum score in the screened list (95), MACD bullish with rising histogram confirming building momentum, RSI 63.8 in the sweet spot bullish zone, and price 5.3% above SMA-20.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ dipped 0.2% and S&P500 held steady, a neutral backdrop that favors stock-picking over macro bets. TSLA is sitting at -6.1% against our -7% stop-loss, so selling it proactively rather than waiting for the auto-trigger frees up ~$749 in capital with control intact. We're swapping our weakest position for AAPL, which carries the top momentum score in today's screened universe and has the rare combination of MACD histogram rising plus RSI in the bullish (not yet overbought) zone.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets traded sideways on April 23, with the S&P 500 essentially flat and the NASDAQ slipping 0.2% as investors digested a mix of ongoing earnings reports and continued uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate policy. Technology stocks showed resilience in leaders like Apple and NVIDIA, which benefit from strong AI-driven demand narratives, while more speculative names like Tesla faced continued pressure from softening EV delivery expectations. With no major macro catalyst to break the stalemate, markets are in a consolidation phase where individual stock momentum is more decisive than index direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股4月23日整體橫行整理，標普500指數收平，那斯達克微跌0.2%，市場在等待聯準會利率政策方向明朗及企業財報潮消化之間維持觀望。蘋果、輝達等AI相關龍頭股憑藉強勁的需求敘事相對抗跌，而特斯拉則因電動車交付前景趨弱持續承壓。整體市場缺乏明確催化劑，個股動能的優劣在此盤整期間比指數走向更能決定獲利空間。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set price level where you exit a losing position to cap your downside — ours is set at -7% from average cost. Rather than waiting for the automatic trigger to fire, exiting a position that is close to the stop-loss (TSLA at -6.1%) is called proactive management: you reclaim control of the exit price, avoid the emotional stress of watching it hit the limit, and immediately free capital to deploy into stronger opportunities.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止損（Stop-Loss）是投資人預先設定的出場價位，當虧損達到一定比例時自動平倉，我們的規則是虧損超過7%即出場。「主動式止損管理」是指在價格還未到達止損線時便主動離場——就像今天的特斯拉已跌至-6.1%，與止損線僅差一步之遙，此時主動賣出可以掌握更好的出場價格，避免被動觸發，並立即釋放資金投入更具動能的標的。
